Part.Source:
AtualisaBaseCalculoCte.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod)
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
// CteVlrRecSer = &CteVlrRecSer
// CteImpVbc = &CteImpVbc // CteImpAliTotTri = &CteImpAliTotTri // CteImpTriVlrPis = &CteImpTriVlrPis // CteImpTriVlrCofins = &CteImpTriVlrCofins // CteImpTriVlrCsll = &CteImpTriVlrCsll CteImpTriVlrInss = (CteImpVbc * (CteImpTriAliInss*0.01)) // CteImpTriVlrIr =&CteImpTriVlrIr CteImpVlrTotTri = ((CteVlrTotPreSer * CteImpAliTotTri)*0.01)
Do case Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros or CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.OutraUF // CteImpAli = &CteImpAli CteImpVlr = (CteImpVbc * (CteImpAli*0.01))
// CteImpVlrCre = &CteImpVlrCre // CteImpPerRed = &CteImpPerRed CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Nao Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal // CteImpAli = &CteImpAli CteImpVlr = (CteImpVbc * (CteImpAli*0.01))
CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Nao Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Nao Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Nao CteImpVstRet = (CteImpVbcRet * (CteImpAliRet*0.01)) // CteImpVbcRet = CteImpVbcRet // CteImpAliRet = CteImpAliRet // CteImpVlrCre = CteImpVlrCre
Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Sim CteImpAli = 0 CteImpVlr = 0 CteImpVlrCre = 0 CteImpPerRed = 0 EndCase
do case case CteVlrRecSer > 0 &AuxBaseMoeda = CteVlrRecSer case CteVlrTotPreSer > 0 &AuxBaseMoeda = CteVlrTotPreSer Otherwise &AuxBaseMoeda = CteImpVbc EndCAse
&CteDesCod = CteDesCod do 'getDestinatario'
//Aqui tem que pegar as configuracoes do IBS e CBS //retorna Categoria imposto padrao CTE RetornaConfSistema.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE, &TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE) &CImpCatCod = val(&TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE) if &CImpCatCod.IsEmpty() prcDefinePadraoCategoriaImpostoCTE.call(EmpCod, FilCod, &CImpCatCod) Endif
&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.Tipo = 'CTE' &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = FilCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = CteLctCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = CteRemUfe &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = CteDesUfe &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &ImpGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &CImpCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.ProCod = 0 //nao tem produto &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IsRetornarObs = true //retornar obs prcRetornaConfiguracaoImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs)
&sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrFrt = &AuxBaseMoeda - (CteImpTriVlrIr+CteImpTriAliInss+CteImpTriVlrPis+CteImpTriVlrCofins+CteImpTriVlrCsll)
//Chamar o Calculador do IBS e CBS CalculaImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs, &SdtImpostoProduto)
//Atualizar Valores de IBS e CBS CteIbsCST = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST CteIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib //CteIbsIndDoa CteIbsBas = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorBaseIbsCbs CteIbsUfTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTax CteIbsUfTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsUfPerDif CteIbsUfVlrDif = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsUfVlrDif CteIbsUfTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs CteIbsUfTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTaxEfe CteIbsUfVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsUf CteIbsMunTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTax CteIbsMunTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsMunPerDif CteIbsMunTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs CteIbsMunTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTaxEfe CteIbsMunVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsMun CteIbsMunVlrDif = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsMunVlrDif
CteIbsVlrTot = &SdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsMun + &SdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsUf
CteCbsTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTax CteCbsTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCbsPerDif CteCbsTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedCbs CteCbsTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTaxEfe
CteCbsVlrDif = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeCbsVlrDif CteCbsVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.ValorCbs
CteTribRegCst = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsSit CteTribRegClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsClassTrib CteTribRegUfTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe CteTribRegUfVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsUfeVlr CteTribRegMunTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe CteTribRegMunVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsMunVlr CteTribRegUnTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegCbsTaxEfe CteTribRegUnVlr = &SdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegCbsVlr
exit EndFor
commit
Sub 'getDestinatario' For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CteDesCod &ImpGruImpCod = PesGruImpCod exit EndFor EndSub
